name: bow-skills
description: Company-wide Claude Code skills. A single 'bow-core' plugin covering the spec→ship development lifecycle plus the team's commit pipeline, Flutter MVVM, and Supabase conventions.

plugins.name: bow-core
plugins.description: Engineering skills across the full spec→ship lifecycle (spec, planning, TDD, debugging, review, simplification, security, performance, observability, shipping, docs, migration, CI/CD), plus the team commit pipeline and Flutter/Supabase conventions. Includes review/security/test/perf subagents.
